name: Supabase
description: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative built on PostgreSQL. It provides auto-generated RESTful APIs for database CRUD, authentication, file storage, edge functions, and real-time subscriptions.

capabilities.name: rows_select
capabilities.description: Read rows from any table with filtering, sorting, pagination, and column selection using PostgREST syntax.

capabilities.name: rows_insert
capabilities.description: Insert one or more rows into a table. Supports upserts and bulk inserts.

capabilities.name: rows_update
capabilities.description: Update rows matching filter conditions. Always requires a filter to prevent full-table updates.

capabilities.name: rows_upsert
capabilities.description: Insert rows or update on conflict (upsert). Requires 'resolution=merge-duplicates' Prefer header.

capabilities.name: rows_delete
capabilities.description: Delete rows matching filter conditions. Always requires a filter.

capabilities.name: rpc_call
capabilities.description: Call a PostgreSQL function (RPC) via the REST API. Useful for complex operations and transactions.

capabilities.name: auth_signup
capabilities.description: Sign up a new user with email and password.

capabilities.name: auth_signin_password
capabilities.description: Sign in a user with email and password.

capabilities.name: auth_signin_otp
capabilities.description: Send a magic link or OTP to a user's email or phone.

capabilities.name: auth_signout
capabilities.description: Sign out a user and invalidate their session.

capabilities.name: auth_get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's profile.

capabilities.name: auth_update_user
capabilities.description: Update the currently authenticated user's email, password, or metadata.

capabilities.name: auth_refresh_token
capabilities.description: Refresh an access token using a refresh token.

capabilities.name: auth_reset_password
capabilities.description: Send a password reset email to a user.

capabilities.name: auth_invite_user
capabilities.description: Invite a user by email (admin only, requires service_role key).

capabilities.name: auth_admin_list_users
capabilities.description: List all users (admin only, requires service_role key).

capabilities.name: auth_admin_get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific user by ID (admin only).

capabilities.name: auth_admin_delete_user
capabilities.description: Delete a user by ID (admin only).

capabilities.name: storage_buckets_list
capabilities.description: List all storage buckets in the project.

capabilities.name: storage_buckets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new storage bucket.

capabilities.name: storage_buckets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific bucket by ID.

capabilities.name: storage_buckets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a storage bucket (must be empty).

capabilities.name: storage_buckets_empty
capabilities.description: Empty all objects from a storage bucket.

capabilities.name: storage_objects_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file to a storage bucket.

capabilities.name: storage_objects_download
capabilities.description: Download a file from a storage bucket.

capabilities.name: storage_objects_list
capabilities.description: List files in a storage bucket path.

capabilities.name: storage_objects_move
capabilities.description: Move or rename a file within or between buckets.

capabilities.name: storage_objects_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more files from a storage bucket.

capabilities.name: storage_objects_create_signed_url
capabilities.description: Generate a signed URL for temporary access to a private file.

capabilities.name: storage_objects_get_public_url
capabilities.description: Get the public URL for a file in a public bucket.

capabilities.name: edge_functions_invoke
capabilities.description: Invoke a Supabase Edge Function by name.

capabilities.name: realtime_subscribe
capabilities.description: Subscribe to real-time changes on a table via WebSocket. Connect to the Realtime server and listen for INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE events.
